decisions.decision: ArtworkSlider rebuilt as CSS-grid crossfade stack (grid-area: stack) instead of horizontal scroll-snap carousel
decisions.rationale: User wanted the counter/arrows to visually stationary during slide changes. With identical per-slide counter/arrow rows stacked in one cell, the crossfade makes them appear constant — only the number digit differs. Simpler than a singleton overlay + sync JS.

decisions.decision: Drag/swipe input re-implemented on top of the crossfade using pointer events with a 10% directional threshold
decisions.rationale: Native scroll-snap was fighting desktop drag release (stuck between slides). With no scroll at all, drag becomes an input gesture that advances index — rock-solid on both mouse and touch.

decisions.decision: Fullscreen modal is portal'd to document.body on slider init
decisions.rationale: Modal z-index: 100 was being capped inside SectionWrapper's stacking context, so the close button rendered under the navbar scrim (z-index 59). Portal-to-body escapes the parent stacking context.

decisions.decision: Mobile slide locked to height: 100svh + grid-template-rows: 45svh auto 1fr + align-content: start
decisions.rationale: Previous auto-rows + max-height:45svh let image heights vary by natural aspect, which drifted the counter position between slides. Explicit row sizing + fixed slide height makes counter position structurally stable.

decisions.decision: CinematicReveal GSAP tween targets computed in pixels (fullBleedMarginLeft) at build time
decisions.rationale: GSAP couldn't interpolate margin:0 auto (browser-resolved px) → marginLeft: calc(-50vw + 50%) string, causing a visible jump at tween start. Computing target in px lets it tween px → px smoothly.
CSS comments label hover-wipe-inverse as 'Primary CTA — dark glass pill' and brushed-brass as just 'Brushed brass button'. User explicitly asked for the primary, not the metallic variant.

decisions.decision: CLAUDE.md now documents Material Symbols as the icon convention
decisions.rationale: User wanted a durable project-level rule instead of per-session memory. CLAUDE.md loads automatically for any Claude session on this repo and serves as documentation for humans too.

context_notes: Phase 03 is code-complete on all 3 planned plans (03-01/02/03). Today's session was a large live-refinement sweep on the KJM exhibition detail page driven by user browser testing. Committed as fe390b2 and pushed to origin/master. All refinements target perceptual polish: back button z-index fixes, hero play/pause control, ArtworkSlider rewrite to crossfade+portal modal, CinematicReveal jump fix, HorizontalSlider breakpoint tuning, Monumental Narratives two-column editorial layout, 5-item Exhibition Videos slider, real exhibition catalogue in shop, primary CTA consistency, Keep Exploring continue-your-visit button, Material Symbols convention in CLAUDE.md. Remaining work is decision-gated (03-04 vs Phase 04) plus perceptual smoke tests the user wants to run themselves. No blockers, working tree clean except for untracked noise.
